Class OpenApiServerGenerator

java.lang.Object
org.gradle.api.internal.AbstractTask
org.gradle.api.DefaultTask
io.micronaut.gradle.openapi.tasks.AbstractOpenApiGenerator<OpenApiServerWorkAction, OpenApiServerWorkAction.ServerParameters>
io.micronaut.gradle.openapi.tasks.OpenApiServerGenerator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<org.gradle.api.Task>, org.gradle.api.internal.DynamicObjectAware, org.gradle.api.internal.TaskInternal, org.gradle.api.Named, org.gradle.api.plugins.ExtensionAware, org.gradle.api.Task, org.gradle.util.Configurable<org.gradle.api.Task>
@CacheableTask public abstract class OpenApiServerGenerator extends AbstractOpenApiGenerator<OpenApiServerWorkAction, OpenApiServerWorkAction.ServerParameters>
